issue.message: The Google Play store has a policy that limits usage of MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE

Implicit dependencies of composables should be made explicit. Usages of viewModel to acquire a ViewModel should be done in composable default parameters, so that it is more testable and flexible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#viewmodels for more information.

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 33. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `FileLogTree` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
This field leaks a context object
Reading a value annotated with @FrequentlyChangingValue inside composition

The resource `R.color.surface_variant` appears to be unused

`CompositionLocal`s are implicit dependencies and creating new ones should be avoided. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#compositionlocals for more information.
issue.errorLine1: /** CompositionLocal provider for DgColorScheme. Crashes clearly if not provided. */

issue.message: `CompositionLocal`s are implicit dependencies and creating new ones should be avoided. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#compositionlocals for more information.
`CompositionLocal`s are implicit dependencies and creating new ones should be avoided. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#compositionlocals for more information.
issue.errorLine1: /** CompositionLocal for [PermissionsManager]. Crashes clearly if not provided. */

issue.message: `CompositionLocal`s are implicit dependencies and creating new ones should be avoided. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#compositionlocals for more information.
issue.errorLine1: /** CompositionLocal for [IntentManager]. Crashes clearly if not provided. */

issue.message: `CompositionLocal`s are implicit dependencies and creating new ones should be avoided. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#compositionlocals for more information.
issue.errorLine1: /** CompositionLocal for [ExitManager]. Crashes clearly if not provided. */

issue.message: This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, sessionId: String, initialRecordCount: Int, viewModel: SessionDetailViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onBack: () -> Unit] but should be [sessionId: String, initialRecordCount: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, viewModel: SessionDetailViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onBack: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, bubble: ChatBubble, showTimestamp: Boolean, topPadding: Dp, isFirstInRun: Boolean = true, isLastInRun: Boolean = true, department: String = "", snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState] but should be [bubble: ChatBubble, showTimestamp: Boolean, topPadding: Dp, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isFirstInRun: Boolean = true, isLastInRun: Boolean = true, department: String = ""]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, assignee: String, alpha: Float = 1f] but should be [assignee: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, alpha: Float = 1f]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, record: SessionRecord] but should be [record: SessionRecord, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, viewModel: BoardViewModel = hiltViewModel(), whiteboardRefresh: Int, onNavigateToThread: ((String) -> Unit)? = null] but should be [whiteboardRefresh: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, viewModel: BoardViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onNavigateToThread: ((String) -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, viewModel: ChatViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onComposeNew: () -> Unit, onOpenConversation: (sessionId: String, department: String) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }] but should be [onComposeNew: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, viewModel: ChatViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onOpenConversation: (sessionId: String, department: String) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, bubble: ChatBubble, isPlaying: Boolean, showTimestamp: Boolean, topPadding: Dp, isFirstInRun: Boolean = true, isLastInRun: Boolean = true, onReplay: () -> Unit] but should be [bubble: ChatBubble, isPlaying: Boolean, showTimestamp: Boolean, topPadding: Dp, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isFirstInRun: Boolean = true, isLastInRun: Boolean = true, onReplay: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, event: OrchestratorEvent] but should be [event: OrchestratorEvent, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, message: HistoryMessage, viewModel: HistoryViewModel] but should be [message: HistoryMessage, viewModel: HistoryViewModel, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit, onSend: () -> Unit, onAttach: () -> Unit = {}, onEmoji: () -> Unit = {}, onImage: () -> Unit = {}, onMic: () -> Unit = {}, isSending: Boolean = false] but should be [value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit, onSend: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onAttach: () -> Unit = {}, onEmoji: () -> Unit = {}, onImage: () -> Unit = {}, onMic: () -> Unit = {}, isSending: Boolean = false]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, bubble: ChatBubble, showTimestamp: Boolean, topPadding: Dp, isFirstInRun: Boolean = true, isLastInRun: Boolean = true, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState] but should be [bubble: ChatBubble, showTimestamp: Boolean, topPadding: Dp, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isFirstInRun: Boolean = true, isLastInRun: Boolean = true]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, post: PulsePost, showChannel: Boolean] but should be [post: PulsePost, showChannel: Boolean, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, record: SessionRecord] but should be [record: SessionRecord, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, session: SessionInfo, onClick: () -> Unit, runningCommand: String? = null, onCommand: ((String) -> Unit)? = null] but should be [session: SessionInfo, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, runningCommand: String? = null, onCommand: ((String) -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, tokenManager: TokenManager, modelManager: ModelManager, ttsEngine: TtsEngine, viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onBack: (() -> Unit)? = null] but should be [tokenManager: TokenManager, modelManager: ModelManager, ttsEngine: TtsEngine, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel(), onBack: (() -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, text: String, toolStatus: String?] but should be [text: String, toolStatus: String?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, record: SessionRecord] but should be [record: SessionRecord, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, tag: String] but should be [tag: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, task: WhiteboardTask, onTapThread: ((String) -> Unit)? = null, dimmed: Boolean = false] but should be [task: WhiteboardTask, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onTapThread: ((String) -> Unit)? = null, dimmed: Boolean = false]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, bubble: ChatBubble, topPadding: Dp] but should be [bubble: ChatBubble, topPadding: Dp, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, record: SessionRecord] but should be [record: SessionRecord, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, record: SessionRecord] but should be [record: SessionRecord, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, record: SessionRecord] but should be [record: SessionRecord, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a List<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `departments: ImmutableList<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class DepartmentsList(val items: List<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a Set<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `selectedDepts: ImmutableSet<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class SelectedDeptsSet(val items: Set<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a List<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `tags: ImmutableList<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class TagsList(val items: List<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a Set<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `excludedTags: ImmutableSet<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class ExcludedTagsSet(val items: Set<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a List<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `allDepartments: ImmutableList<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class AllDepartmentsList(val items: List<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a Set<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `selectedDepts: ImmutableSet<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class SelectedDeptsSet(val items: Set<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a List<ThreadInfo> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `threads: ImmutableList<ThreadInfo>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class ThreadsList(val items: List<ThreadInfo>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.

The Compose Compiler cannot infer the stability of a parameter if a List<String> is used in it, even if the item type is stable. You should use Kotlinx Immutable Collections instead: `availableVoices: ImmutableList<String>` or create an `@Immutable` wrapper for this class: `@Immutable data class AvailableVoicesList(val items: List<String>)` See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#avoid-using-unstable-collections for more information.
